	(function($){
		var selectedBranch = { gop: '', loc_id: '36137' };
		// watch the Forminator date field
		function attachDate(el){
			if (el._attached) return;
			el._attached = true;

			function handle(val){
				if (!val) return;
				if (selectedBranch.gop) {
					$('.appointment-slot .fem-cust').remove();
					$('.appointment-slot select[name="select-1"]').html('');
					var data = {
						action:       'da_single_doc_availability',
						country:      'India',
						date:         val,
						consultantid: selectedBranch.gop,
						hos_id:       selectedBranch.loc_id
					};
					$.post(ajaxurl, data, function(response){
						if (response != '') {
							$('.appointment-slot select[name="select-1"]').html(response);
						}else{
							$('.appointment-slot').append('<span style="display:inline-block!important;position:initial!important" class="forminator-error-message fem-cust">Timings are unavailable. Please select a different date. </span>');
						}
					});
				}else{
					$('.appointment-slot select[name="select-1"]').html('');
				}
			}

			if (el._flatpickr) {
				el._flatpickr.config.onChange.push((d,str)=>handle(str));
			} else {
				// fallback: normal input
				$(el).on('change input', ()=>handle(el.value));
			}
		}

		function scan(){
			$('.appointment-form .appointment-date input[name="date-1"]').each((i,e)=>attachDate(e));
		}

		// run on ready + after form loads
		$(scan);
		$(document).on('forminator:form:render forminator:form:loaded', scan);

	})(jQuery);
